en.title: Page description
en.prompt: Generate 5 unique meta descriptions, of a maximum of 150 characters, for the following text. They should be catchy with a call to action, including the term [keywords] in them: [page content]

related.title: Rephrase
related.remark: Rewrite the specified content into multiple versions to avoid text duplication.

related.title: Popular Related
related.remark: This can be used to understand the focus of users on specific topics, or to organize the structure of articles. It can also be changed to 'popular keywords', 'popular topics', 'popular brands', 'popular websites' and so on.

related.title: FAQs Generator
related.remark: Generate common Q&A based on content.

metaDescription: Need clickable snippets? Generate 5 unique, catchy meta descriptions under 150 chars. Include keywords and CTAs to boost search visibility now!

faq.q: The generated description exceeds 150 characters, what do I do?
faq.a: Say explicitly "strictly keep within 150 characters, roughly 50-70 Chinese characters including spaces and punctuation." Character counts differ between Chinese and English and without specifying the language the length drifts. You should also count the result yourself, since the AI's character counting is frequently off.

faq.q: How do I generate descriptions in multiple languages at once?
faq.a: Do it in two steps: first generate 5 versions in Chinese, then "translate each of the above 5 versions into English, keeping within about 155 characters." Requesting multiple languages in one go gets mixed up, and each language has a different cap (Google allows roughly 78 Chinese characters for descriptions).
